name: ZenBook Pro 16
description: Ultra-thin powerhouse with a 16-inch 4K OLED display, Intel i7-13700H, 16 GB RAM, and 512 GB SSD. Perfect for creative professionals and power users who demand portability without compromise.

name: Budget ChromeBook Air
description: Lightweight ChromeOS laptop with 14-inch FHD display, MediaTek Kompanio 520, 4 GB RAM, and 64 GB eMMC. Ideal for students and everyday browsing on a tight budget.

name: Titan RTX Gaming Rig
description: Desktop gaming beast with RTX 4070 Ti, AMD Ryzen 9 7900X, 32 GB DDR5 RAM, 1 TB NVMe SSD, and liquid cooling. Dominates AAA titles at ultra settings and handles VR with ease.

name: SonicWave Pro Headphones
description: Premium over-ear wireless headphones with adaptive noise cancellation, 40-hour battery life, Hi-Res Audio certification, and memory-foam cushions for all-day comfort.

name: EchoBuds Lite
description: Affordable true-wireless earbuds with 8-hour playback, IPX5 water resistance, touch controls, and a compact charging case. Great workout companion at a fraction of the price.

name: Pulse Fit Smartwatch
description: Feature-packed fitness smartwatch with heart-rate monitoring, GPS, SpO2 sensor, 5 ATM water resistance, and 7-day battery. Tracks 100+ workout types and syncs with all major health apps.

name: NexHub Smart Speaker
description: Voice-controlled smart speaker with 360° room-filling sound, built-in smart-home hub (Zigbee + Matter), 7-inch touch display, and video-call camera. The nerve center for your connected home.

name: ProStylus Drawing Tablet
description: Professional pen display with 13.3-inch laminated screen, 8192 pressure levels, 120% sRGB color accuracy, and tilt support. A must-have for digital artists and illustrators.

name: CloudCam Security System
description: Two-camera indoor/outdoor security kit with 2K HDR video, night vision, AI person detection, two-way audio, and 30-day cloud storage included. Peace of mind, no subscription required for the first year.

name: Velocity Gaming Mouse
description: Ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse (58 g) with 25K DPI sensor, Optical Gen-3 switches, 70-hour battery, and RGB underglow. Built for competitive FPS and esports.

name: AuraTab Pro 12.9
description: Premium tablet with 12.9-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, M2 chip, 8 GB RAM, Face ID, and Thunderbolt port. Supports stylus input and desktop-class apps for on-the-go productivity.

name: SnapLens Mirrorless Camera
description: Full-frame 45 MP mirrorless camera with 8K video recording, in-body stabilisation (5-axis), dual card slots, and weather-sealed magnesium body. A dream kit for photographers and filmmakers.

name: MeshLink Wi-Fi 7 Router
description: Tri-band Wi-Fi 7 mesh router with 19 Gbps aggregate speed, 6 GHz support, coverage up to 5,500 sq ft, and built-in VPN server. Future-proof your entire home network.

name: FlexGrip Keyboard 75%
description: Hot-swappable mechanical keyboard in 75% layout with gasket-mounted design, south-facing RGB LEDs, PBT keycaps, and tri-mode connectivity (USB-C, Bluetooth, 2.4 GHz). Buttery smooth typing for work or gaming.

name: UltraSharp 4K Monitor
description: 27-inch IPS 4K monitor with 100% sRGB / 98% DCI-P3, USB-C 90W PD, KVM switch, and factory-calibrated ΔE < 2. Stunning color accuracy for designers and developers alike.

name: ThunderDock USB-C Hub
description: 13-in-1 USB-C docking station with dual HDMI 4K@60Hz, 100W passthrough charging, SD/microSD slots, Ethernet, and 3 USB-A ports. One cable to rule them all.

name: Horizon Action Camera
description: Pocket-sized action camera with 5.3K@60fps, HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilisation, 10m waterproofing (no case), and 177° ultra-wide FOV. Capture every adventure in cinematic detail.

name: NovaGlow Smart Bulbs (4-Pack)
description: RGBWW smart bulbs with 16 million colors, tunable white (2700K–6500K), Matter-compatible, and no hub required. Set scenes, schedules, and automation from your phone or voice assistant.

name: AeroFit ANC Earphones
description: Neckband-style wireless earphones with hybrid ANC, LDAC codec support, 20-hour battery, IPX5 rating, and multipoint connection. Premium audio without the premium price tag.

name: PixelPad Budget Tablet
description: 10.4-inch tablet with 2K display, Snapdragon 680, 4 GB RAM, quad speakers with Dolby Atmos, and 7040 mAh battery. The best value Android tablet for media consumption and light productivity.

name: Phantom VR Headset
description: Standalone VR headset with dual 2160×2160 LCD panels, pancake lenses, Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2, hand tracking 2.0, and mixed-reality passthrough. Immersive gaming and fitness without a PC.

name: Chrono Luxe Smartband
description: Slim fitness band with 1.62-inch AMOLED display, heart rate + SpO2, 14-day battery, 5 ATM waterproofing, and 120+ sport modes. All-day health tracking that fits under your shirt cuff.

name: StormCharge Power Bank
description: 20,000 mAh power bank with 65W USB-C PD fast charging, passthrough charging, LED display, and dual output. Charges a laptop to 50% in under an hour on the go.

name: DeskRiser Ergonomic Stand
description: Adjustable aluminium laptop/monitor riser with ventilation holes, cable management, and anti-slip pads. Elevates your screen to eye level to reduce neck strain during long work sessions.

name: Blaze Gaming Laptop 17
description: 17.3-inch QHD 240Hz gaming laptop with RTX 4060, AMD Ryzen 7 7745HX, 16 GB DDR5, 1 TB NVMe SSD, and per-key RGB keyboard. Portable enough for LAN parties, powerful enough for AAA gaming.

name: BoomBox Portable Speaker
description: Rugged Bluetooth 5.3 speaker with 24-hour battery, IP67 waterproofing, 40W stereo sound, and party-link for pairing up to 100 speakers. Your ultimate outdoor companion.

name: Apex Elite Smartwatch
description: Premium smartwatch with titanium case, sapphire crystal, AMOLED always-on display, 14-day battery, dual-band GPS, and offline maps. Built for athletes and adventurers.

name: AirPure Smart Air Purifier
description: HEPA-13 smart air purifier with real-time AQI sensor, auto mode, whisper-quiet operation (22 dB), and app/voice control. Covers rooms up to 650 sq ft for fresh, clean air.

name: CineView Mini Projector
description: Portable 1080p LED projector with 300 ANSI lumens, auto-keystone, built-in Netflix/YouTube, Bluetooth speakers, and HDMI/USB-C input. Cinema-quality entertainment anywhere.

name: SwiftTab E-Ink Reader
description: 7-inch E-Ink reader with 300 PPI display, adjustable warm light, IPX8 waterproofing, 8 weeks battery life, and 32 GB storage. Carry your entire library in your pocket.

name: DroneX Aerial Pro
description: Foldable 4K drone with 48MP camera, 3-axis gimbal, 46-min flight time, obstacle sensing on all sides, and ActiveTrack 5.0. Professional aerial photography made easy.

name: TurboNet 5G Hotspot
description: Pocket 5G mobile hotspot with Wi-Fi 6E, 6000 mAh battery (16-hour life), support for 32 devices, and USB-C tethering. Stay connected at blazing speeds on the move.

name: ErgoMax Wireless Mouse
description: Ergonomic vertical wireless mouse with 4000 DPI sensor, silent clicks, USB-C rechargeable (3-month battery), and Bluetooth + 2.4 GHz dual connectivity. Say goodbye to wrist strain.

name: ThermoSense Smart Thermostat
description: AI-learning smart thermostat with energy-saving algorithms, remote sensing, geofencing, humidity control, and sleek touchscreen display. Saves up to 23% on heating/cooling bills.

name: GamePad Ultra Controller
description: Premium wireless game controller with Hall effect sticks (no drift), adaptive triggers, HD haptics, 40-hour battery, and tri-mode connectivity. Works with PC, Switch, and mobile.

name: SoundStage Home Theater
description: 5.1.2 Dolby Atmos soundbar system with wireless subwoofer, rear speakers, eARC, and room calibration. Transform your living room into a cinematic experience with spatial audio.
